headline: How The Babcock International Group (LSE:BAB) Story Is Shifting With A Subtle Valuation Reset
summary: The latest analyst update on Babcock International Group nudges the modelled fair value per share from £15.46 to £15.47, a very small shift that still matters for how you read the story. Bullish and bearish analysts interpret this tweak differently, with some seeing it as a sign of steady confidence and others viewing it as limited new upside, all rooted in how they weigh the underlying valuation assumptions. As you read on, you will see how to track these changing views and what they might...

headline: Meta Looks to Raise as Much as $25 Billion With Jumbo Bond Sale
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Meta Platforms Inc. is looking to sell between $20 billion and $25 billion of investment-grade bonds on Thursday, according to people with knowledge of the transaction, as the Facebook parent boosts spending on infrastructure for the artificial intelligence boom.
